ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "study_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the study */,
  "study_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "study_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "study_status" TEXT /* Status of the study (e.g., active, inactive, completed) */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "concepts" (
  "concept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each concept */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the concept belongs to */,
  "number" INTEGER /* Number associated with the concept */,
  "english" TEXT /* English word or phrase describing the concept */,
  "concepticon_id" INTEGER /* Concepticon ID for the concept */,
  "concepticon_gloss" TEXT /* Concepticon gloss for the concept */,
  "number_incorrect" INTEGER /* Number of incorrect entries for the concept */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the concept in the study */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the concept (e.g., English, Spanish, French) */,
  "part_of_speech" TEXT /* Part of speech for the concept (e.g., noun, verb, adjective) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("concept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "concept_translations" (
  "translation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each translation */,
  "concept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the concept being translated */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the translation */,
  "translation" TEXT /* Translated word or phrase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("translation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_concept_translations_concept_id FOREIGN KEY ("concept_id") REFERENCES concepts ("concept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, research institution) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_study_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being granted access */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study being accessed */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read-only, edit, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_study_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_study_access_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study being noted */,
  "note" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the note */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_notes_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "concept_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "concept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the concept being commented on */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the comment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_concept_comments_concept_id FOREIGN KEY ("concept_id") REFERENCES concepts ("concept_id")
)
column_names: Status of the study (e.g., active, inactive, completed)
